title: serapias × walravensiana
intro: Serapias × walravensiana, also known as the Walravens' Orchid or Walravens' Spurge Orchid, is a hybrid orchid species that is a cross between Serapias cordifolia and Serapias vomeracea. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to protect the body from damage caused by free radicals. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as its potential to help manage certain diseases such as diabetes and arthritis. The herbal preparation of Serapias × walravensiana is typically made by drying the roots and leaves, which can then be used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures.
